/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.1.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sspm.dir/src/cli/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sspm.dir/src/cli/commands.cpp.o -o sspm  libsspm_core.a -lsqlite3 /opt/local/lib/libcurl.dylib /opt/local/libexec/openssl3/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/local/libexec/openssl3/lib/libcrypto.dylib
